tagline: Mission logs, incident reports, clearance-aware records
demo_narrative: Data never touches a commercial cloud. Every token generated stayed on this box. If your ATO blocks outbound egress, this still works.

schema.name: synthetic_mission_reports
schema.description: Synthetic mission activity records for defense-oriented demos. All fields fabricated.

columns.name: executive_summary
columns.system_prompt: You are a military staff writer. Use formal DOD report style. One paragraph, no classification markings in the text body itself.
columns.prompt: Write an executive summary paragraph for a {{ classification }} report from {{ operational_area }} dated {{ report_date }} describing a {{ incident_type }}. Include who, what, when, where, and operational significance. Do not fabricate real unit designators or personnel names.

columns.name: recommended_action
columns.system_prompt: Staff writer. Use imperative voice. 2-4 sentences.
columns.prompt:
Given this situation: {{ executive_summary }}

Write a recommended action section. Include immediate actions, reporting requirements, and escalation thresholds.
